result.stdout:
Usage: stamp component list [options]

Options:

  -h | --help                    
  Show help information

  -q | --query       <TEXT>      
  Query the component name

  -o | --owner       <TEXT>      
  Query by the owning user

  -c | --category    <TEXT>      
  Query by the component topic
